'''zhapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ottava|ottava]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ottava|ottava]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhapate|zhapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhapatesher|zhapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapatesherĂ«m|zhapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhapatero|zhapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhapateshĂ«|zhapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapateshĂ«m|zhapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhapatero|gokizhapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhapateshĂ«|gokizhapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapateshĂ«m|gokizhapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhapankerom|gozhapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhapankeshĂ«|gozhapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhapankeshĂ«m|gozhapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhapankeya|gozhapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhapaterom|zhapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapatemu|zhapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhapateya|zhapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhapaterom|gokizhapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapatemu|gokizhapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhapateya|gokizhapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhapapate|zhapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhapapatesher|zhapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapapatesherĂ«m|zhapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhapapatero|zhapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhapapateshĂ«|zhapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapapateshĂ«m|zhapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhapapatero|gokizhapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhapapateshĂ«|gokizhapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapapateshĂ«m|gokizhapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhapapankerom|gozhapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhapapankeshĂ«|gozhapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhapapankeshĂ«m|gozhapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhapapankeya|gozhapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhapapaterom|zhapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhapapatemu|zhapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhapapateya|zhapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhapapaterom|gokizhapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhapapatemu|gokizhapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhapapateya|gokizhapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠpĂŠte|zhĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠpĂŠtesher|zhĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠpĂŠtero|zhĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠpĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠpĂŠterom|zhĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠpĂŠtemu|zhĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠpĂŠteya|zhĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠpĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠpĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafpafte|zhafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafpaftesher|zhafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafpaftesherĂ«m|zhafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafpaftero|zhafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafpafteshĂ«|zhafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafpafteshĂ«m|zhafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafpaftero|gokizhafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafpafteshĂ«|gokizhafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafpafteshĂ«m|gokizhafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafpafnkerom|gozhafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafpafnkeshĂ«|gozhafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafpafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafpafnkeya|gozhafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafpafterom|zhafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafpaftemu|zhafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafpafteya|zhafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafpafterom|gokizhafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafpaftemu|gokizhafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafpafteya|gokizhafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
